## Validation completed
- [ ] Backend tests: `uv run pytest -q` (or `make backend-test`)
- [ ] Frontend tests: `cd frontend && npm test` (or `make frontend-test`)
- [ ] Frontend type-check: `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit` (or `make frontend-typecheck`)
- [ ] Frontend build: `cd frontend && npm run build` (or `make frontend-build`)

(Or confirm `make validate-all` passed.)
